quality.rationale: Combines Komar angular momentum integral, curved-spacetime Stokes theorem, and vacuum stress-energy condition to rigorously prove vanishing radiative flux without linearization assumptions.

origin.question: Problem 18.9. Show that gravitational radiation generated by an axisymmetric system carries no net angular momentum. (Do not assume that the sources have weak internal gravitational fields.)
origin.answer: The angular momentum flux of the waves vanishes.
